title: Rapid design and implementation of an adaptive pooling workflow for SARS-CoV-2 testing in an NHS diagnostic laboratory: A proof-of-concept study
author: Crone, Michael Andrew
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The raw data provided here contains all data necessary to replicate the findings of the sensitivity experiments and the pooling experiments conducted. More detailed data, including that submitted to the LIMS system using the command centre and Riffyn cannot be provided as although the data contains anonymised container IDs, these could be linked back to patients if there is access to the laboratory LIMS system.
steps_raw: The raw data provided here contains all data necessary to replicate the findings of the sensitivity experiments and the pooling experiments conducted.
